## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content quality and partnership with Biologica, addressing challenges and planning future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Biologica experiencing significant editing workload; content quality inconsistent despite extensive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [GrowthX implementing new AI workflows to improve output quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Partnership to continue with focus on meeting Biologica's quality standards in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Post-launch content strategy to expand, including SEO-focused and question-based content](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Challenges

  - [Biologica expected initial back-and-forth, but editing workload higher than anticipated](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Quality improvements seen, then declined in August](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Recent outputs show improvement (e.g., alcohol article), but inconsistency remains](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Feedback often seems unaddressed in new content batches](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Biologica spending 30-60 minutes reviewing each piece](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### GrowthX's Process Improvements

  - [Implemented custom AI workflows for complex content creation](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [New system includes research planning, drafting, product integration, and guideline validation](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Added medical claim annotation for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Confident in achieving more consistent quality with new processes](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### Partnership Concerns and Next Steps

  - [Biologica feeling the partnership is costly for current output quality](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [GrowthX given 2-3 weeks to demonstrate consistent quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled in two weeks to assess progress](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [If quality standards not met, partnership to be reevaluated](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Post-Launch Content Strategy

  - [Initial focus on social media and influencer marketing for first 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed expanding to SEO-focused content and question-based knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Strategy to leverage existing medically-reviewed content as starting point for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to implement new AI workflows and address feedback consistently](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Biologica to monitor content quality improvements over next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled in two weeks to assess progress](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop long-term content strategy proposal, including SEO and question-based content](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Begin planning expansion of content using medically-reviewed pieces as foundation](https://fathom.video/share/k5pjVCmVBctATHszfyrVRQx3g4Pxs1kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
